tags.description: Supercharger for Business site, owned and branded by a 3rd party (Francis Energy) but operated by Tesla. Non-Teslas can charge here. Charging cables use the Tesla MagicDock, so each cable contains both a NACS (Tesla) plug and a CCS Combo1 adapter.
tags.name: Francis Energy Supercharger
